query:
ALTER TABLE contacts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailStatus ENUM('valid', 'bounced', 'unsubscribed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'valid',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailBouncedAt DATETIME,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailUnsubscribedAt DATETIME;
